properties.association-query-xml:
<mapper>
    <collection name="desadv_header">
        <select>select * from desadv_header where is_success=1</select>
        <collection name="desadv_detail">
            <select>select * from desadv_detail WHERE parent_id = :id</select>
        </collection>
    </collection>
</mapper>

properties.Allowed Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS
